ShowLauncher.Name: Show Imp Theater launcher
ShowLauncher.Hint: Client setting: shows the small Theater button on the canvas.

AutoOpenOnPlay.Name: Open when playback starts
AutoOpenOnPlay.Hint: Client setting: opens the Theater window when the GM starts playback.

SyncTolerance.Name: Sync tolerance in seconds
SyncTolerance.Hint: Client setting: direct media is corrected only when it drifts beyond this value.

UI.SourcePlaceholder: Foundry file path, direct media URL, or YouTube link
UI.Title: Title
UI.YoutubeNote: YouTube embed is synchronized, but each player still needs direct access to YouTube.
UI.Empty: GM can load a Foundry file, a direct media URL, or a YouTube embed link.

Notifications.SourceRequired: Imp Theater: add a source URL first.
Notifications.PlaylistNameRequired: Imp Theater: enter a playlist name.
Notifications.PlaylistRequired: Imp Theater: create or select a playlist first.
Notifications.MediaError: Imp Theater: the media source could not be loaded.
Notifications.ClickToPlay: Imp Theater: browser autoplay was blocked. Click Play in the Theater window.
